summary: Screen Animations, NPC Quick Reference & Mobile Toggle Testing - 18 tests total (12 frontend + 6 backend). All tests PASSED. New features working correctly.

breakdown.test_npc_quick_reference.py (backend): 6/6 passed - NPCs CRUD, Locations, Campaigns, Characters APIs
breakdown.screen-animations-npc-mobile.spec.ts (fr: 12/12 passed - Animation classes, Mobile toggle, NPC Quick Reference

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test campaign and test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three enhancements tested successfully: 1) Dashboard has card-animated, hover-lift, stagger-N CSS classes for professional animations, 2) Mobile toggle (#mobile-nav-toggle) shows PLAYER HUB and GM SIDE buttons on screens <768px, switching mobileView state to show/hide player-section and gm-section, 3) NPCs tab in GM Screen sidebar (data-testid='tab-npcs') loads NPCQuickReference component with search, location filter, and expand/collapse functionality.

features: Character cards have card-animated, hover-lift, transition-smooth classes
Campaign cards have card-animated, hover-lift classes
Staggered animation delays (stagger-1 to stagger-8) applied correctly
PLAYER HUB and GM SIDE buttons visible on mobile (<768px)
Toggle switches between player-section and gm-section correctly
NPCs tab (data-testid='tab-npcs') visible in GM Screen sidebar
Location filter dropdown with 'All Locations' option
NPC cards expand/collapse to show details
View Full Details button appears when expanded
